pr.title: feat: distribute the plugin via Codex's marketplace
pr.body:
## Summary
- Adds **`.codex-plugin/plugin.json`** — Codex plugin manifest mirroring the existing Claude/Cursor manifests, with Codex-specific fields (`skills`, `mcpServers`, `interface`).
- Adds **`.agents/plugins/marketplace.json`** — Codex's native repo-scoped marketplace location (sits outside the manifest folder, unlike Claude/Cursor). Codex also reads `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json` as a fallback; we ship the native path anyway.
- Users on Codex CLI v0.117.0+ can now install with `codex plugin marketplace add GitGuardian/agent-skills` instead of falling through to the skills.sh CLI.
- README gets a Codex install subsection; Codex is removed from the skills.sh agent list since it now has a native path.
- AGENTS.md picks up a Codex marketplace section, repo-structure tree updates, structural-rules notes for `.codex-plugin/` and the marketplace location, and the renamed "Vendor docs index" (was "Anthropic docs index") with Codex / Cursor / cross-vendor URLs added for future reference.

## Test plan
- [x] All JSON manifests parse (`jq empty`)
- [x] `claude plugin validate .` passes (existing manifests unaffected)
- [ ] On a machine with Codex CLI v0.117.0+: `codex plugin marketplace add GitGuardian/agent-skills` and `codex plugin install gitguardian` succeed, and `codex plugin list` shows the plugin enabled
- [ ] Spot-check: the bundled `.mcp.json` is picked up by Codex on install

## References
- https://developers.openai.com/codex/plugins
- https://developers.openai.com/codex/plugins/build
- https://developers.openai.com/codex/skills

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
pr.author: mathieubellon
